Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-</div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="hidden">Choose the language</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local"> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger__line"><</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']</p> <div class="element"><ul id="manual-list-wrap-ul"> <li class="archive-element"> <a aria-hidden="true" href="/nb-NO/fellesrad/melhus-fellesrad/startsiden/oppslagstavle/kirkeklokkene%20ringer%20for%20gaza/" tabindex="-1"> <</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Melhus kommune</h3> <div class="page-url">https://www.melhus.kommune.no/beredskap.345058.no.html</div> <div>Avvik: 7 | Bestått: 39</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="dib notification-headline">    Faktura for kommunale avgifter: Fra neste år slipper du å forskuddsbetale for vann og avløp</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'</p> <div class="element"><a class="morebtn inverted" href="/faktura-for-kommunale-avgifter-fra-neste-aar-slipper-du-aa-forskuddsbetale-for-vann-og-avloep.6735159-340825.html">Les mer</a></div> <div class="fix">Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button</p> <div class="element"><a class="pa closebtn" href="#" onclick="$.cookie('notification6735159', 'closed', { path: '/' }); $('#notification6735159').hide(); $(window).trigger('resize.px.parallax'); return false;" title="Fjer</div> <div class="fix">Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a class="menuitem menulevel0 newwindow" data-cat="419296" href="/skjema.419296.no.html" id="mainmenuamenuitem419296" target="_blank">Skjema</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/MelhusKommune/" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebooklogo svart" src="https://img5.custompublish.com/getfile.php/4045416.2355.bujuutm777itiq/facebook-app-logo.png" style</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p><ul> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable</p> <div class="element"><ul class="burger" onclick="toggleMobileMenu(this);"> <li></li> <li></li> <li></li> </ul></div> <div class="fix">Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'path' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="path"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Tilgjengelighetserklæring - Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 -
